zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强上行趋势延续
zh.content:
当前SOL/美元整体维持震荡上行结构，价格站稳70美元上方后延续温和反弹，短线趋势偏多，但仍处于区间整理阶段，尚未形成强势突破行情。

MACD指标维持零轴上方且柱体为正，动能略有增强，但RSI缺失使超买情况不明。均线方面价格明显高于20日均线，趋势支撑有效。

短期阻力关注70.9至71.5区域，若放量突破有望打开上行空间。下方支撑位在69.8附近，进一步强支撑位于67.2一带，回调空间有限。

操作上建议回踩69.8附近分批低吸，止损设于67.2下方，目标看向71.5及更高区间。若跌破支撑则需转为震荡思路控制风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is showing mild bullish consolidation above 20-day SMA. Price 70.57 near intraday high 70.87 low 69.83. Structure suggests tightening range after prior accumulation. Maintaining above 70 psychological level indicates buyers defending dips. Momentum is gradually improving but not yet trending strongly; market remains in early recovery phase. Volume confirmation would be required to validate a sustained breakout attempt higher.

MACD at 0.39539890 reflects positive momentum, suggesting bullish pressure is currently dominant on shorter-term structure. However, the absence of a signal line value limits full crossover confirmation, implying the trend is not fully mature. RSI data is unavailable, but price behavior near upper range of the day hints at neutral-to-slightly-overbought conditions. Overall momentum remains constructive but requires confirmation before continuation.

Immediate support is forming around 69.83–70.00, aligning with the recent intraday low and psychological round level. A stronger structural support sits at the 20-day SMA near 67.18, which would be critical in case of deeper retracement. On the upside, resistance is observed at 70.87, with a breakout above opening potential toward 72.50 and beyond if momentum expands. This zone represents a key short-term decision area for traders.

From a trading perspective, the market favors range strategies while price remains between 69.8 and 70.9. Buy-the-dip approaches near support may be considered with tight risk control below 69.5. Alternatively, breakout traders can wait for a confirmed move above 70.9 before targeting 72–74. Risk management remains essential, as momentum is improving but not yet decisively trending. Position sizing should reflect current volatility conditions.
